title: Dressellian resistance
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Update|[[Stay on Target (sourcebook)|''Stay on Target'']]}}
The '''Dressellians' resistance''' was a conflict between the [[Dressellian/Legends|Dressellian]] people and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation force on [[Dressel/Legends|Dressel]].

==Background==
Nearly two centuries after their discovery by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]], the people of Dressel were subjugated by the Galactic Empire. The Imperials planned to strip the [[Dressellian Asteroid Belt]] of its resources, while the planet Dressel was to serve as an Imperial mining headquarters.

==The conflict==
Not willing to remain oppressed, the [[Dressellian/Legends|Dressellians]] rebelled against the Imperial occupation, and with Bothan support, were able to arm themselves and fight for their freedom.

The [[Dressellian Projectile Rifle]] was produced in large numbers by the Dressellians and the Bothans during the conflict, and aided them in driving off the Imperial occupiers.

==Aftermath==
The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was impressed by the Dressellians' resilience in their struggle against the Empire, and offered them the chance to join the larger resistance force. [[Orrimaarko/Legends|Orrimaarko]] was one of the veterans who volunteered for service. Their cooperation with the Alliance later lead the Dressellians to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
